cases.name: Autonomous Exploration Survey
cases.algorithm: Weighted multi-layer raster fusion + connected-component target extraction
cases.architecture_type: Batch geospatial pipeline (offline, not real-time); output belongs in a GIS layer (PostGIS) for QGIS/ArcGIS
cases.why_distinct: The only case that is fundamentally a mapping/GIS problem, not a monitoring problem.

cases.name: Portable Core/Rock/Ore Analyzer
cases.algorithm: Baseline-removed cosine-similarity spectral matching vs. mineral reference library
cases.architecture_type: Offline-first mobile/embedded device with store-and-forward sync to a LIMS-style central database
cases.why_distinct: The only case built around a store-and-forward offline architecture from the ground up — the instrument may be used far from any network.

cases.name: Ore Grade Control
cases.algorithm: PI dosing control with dead-band and slew-rate limiting (OPC UA setpoint output)
cases.architecture_type: Closed-loop OT/control integration via OPC UA into the plant DCS/PLC — tightest latency requirement of all 15
cases.why_distinct: The only closed-loop case that actuates equipment directly (within safe bounds) rather than just advising a human.

cases.name: Copper Electrolysis Automation
cases.algorithm: Robust z-score hot-spot detection on tankhouse thermal scans (MAD-based)
cases.architecture_type: Mobile crane-mounted inspection system, radio-linked to the control room; integrates with crane scheduling
cases.why_distinct: The only case where the sensor itself is mobile — mounted on moving industrial equipment rather than fixed.

cases.name: Pit Slope Stability
cases.architecture_type: Geotechnical instrumentation (ground-based radar/InSAR) with an established predictive method; alarms wire into the evacuation/dispatch system
cases.why_distinct: The only case built around a named, published geotechnical formula (Fukuzono inverse-velocity) rather than generic anomaly detection.

cases.name: Haul Truck Blind-Zone Safety
cases.architecture_type: Vehicle-edge (Jetson-class GPU) with inter-vehicle wireless mesh; integrates with the mine's Fleet Management System
cases.why_distinct: The only case requiring direct vehicle-to-vehicle communication, independent of the central platform — central-server latency is unacceptable in a collision scenario.

cases.name: Vanyukov Furnace Optimization
cases.algorithm: First-principles oxygen/mass balance + EWMA residual correction (advisory-only)
cases.architecture_type: Hybrid physics-informed + ML advisory system on the operator's HMI screen
cases.why_distinct: The only case combining a physics-based model with ML, and the one place auto-actuation is deliberately excluded on safety grounds.

cases.name: Predictive Maintenance (Flotation/Pumps)
cases.algorithm: FFT fault-band analysis + ISO 20816-3 zone classification (Group 2, rigid)
cases.architecture_type: Standards-compliant condition monitoring with enterprise CMMS work-order integration
cases.why_distinct: The only case governed by a specific, citable international standard (ISO 20816-3) rather than a custom threshold.

cases.name: Lake Balkhash Biodiversity Monitoring
cases.algorithm: Registration-frequency trend + Shannon diversity index + species-change flags
cases.architecture_type: Remote, intermittent-connectivity camera network: solar camera traps + on-device MegaDetector, satellite/cellular sync
cases.why_distinct: The only case designed around solar power and store-and-forward sync from the start — and the only one where 'critical' means an ecologically significant finding, not danger.

cases.name: Underground Communications & Safety Mesh
cases.algorithm: Store-and-forward buffering with in-order burst replay + delivery verification
cases.architecture_type: Hybrid multi-radio network: leaky feeder (voice) + private LTE/5G (data/video) + LoRaWAN (low-power sensors)
cases.why_distinct: The only case that is fundamentally a telecom/network-engineering problem, not a sensing/ML problem.

cases.name: Energy Consumption Optimization
cases.algorithm: Greedy tariff-aware load-shift scheduling under a peak-demand cap
cases.architecture_type: Enterprise energy-management system (EMS) reading existing metering/SCADA; optimization solver against the real tariff schedule
cases.why_distinct: The only case where the 'AI' is properly an optimization solver, not a trained model — load-shifting is a classic operations-research problem.

cases.name: Driver Fatigue / Microsleep Detection
cases.architecture_type: In-cab embedded device (IR camera + edge processor) with vehicle CAN-bus integration
cases.why_distinct: The only case requiring direct vehicle electrical/bus integration, not just a camera — fatigue events correlate with what the vehicle was doing.

cases.name: PPE & Behavior Compliance
cases.algorithm: YOLO11 PPE detection + InsightFace ID + geofence (live camera pipeline)
cases.architecture_type: Edge CV inference (fixed/mobile camera + edge box or central GPU) tied to the HR/workforce roster system
cases.why_distinct: The only case with individual worker identification tied to an HR-style system — which is also why it carries explicit consent/privacy obligations.

cases.name: Reversing Wagon Rear Camera
cases.algorithm: Proximity + motion-dwell fusion with flicker-reject filter (offline fail-safe)
cases.architecture_type: Standalone fail-safe device wired directly to the in-cab display — deliberately NOT cloud-dependent
cases.why_distinct: The only case explicitly designed to keep working if the rest of the platform is completely down; the central link is for logging only.

cases.name: Concrete/Asphalt Core Analyzer
cases.algorithm: Spectral material match (shared Case 02 core) + SonReb NDT strength estimate
cases.architecture_type: Multi-modal portable NDT device: spectral analysis + rebound hammer / ultrasonic pulse velocity, linked to a project/lot record
cases.why_distinct: The only case fusing spectral + mechanical/acoustic sensing in one device, with per-sample traceability to a specific pour/batch/location.
